CustomField.formula:
IF( ACTID__c <> "", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000002I0G2", "ACT!" ),
IF( GMID__c <> "", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=015i0000002I0G7&oid=00DEc00000Z4Qlx&lastMod=1408921142000", "GM" ),
IF( Dynamics_ID__c <> "", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=015i0000002Hyzo&oid=00DEc00000Z4Qlx&lastMod=1399037431000", "Dynamics" ),
If( MDM_Code__c <> "" , IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=015i0000002I0FY&oid=00DEc00000Z4Qlx&lastMod=1399037439000", "DD"),
IF( 00Ni000000CKD8i <> "", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=015i0000002I0Fd&oid=00DEc00000Z4Qlx&lastMod=1399037448000", "Five9" ),
"")))))
CustomField.label: Data Source
